Solar Mining Calculator

// CAN YOUR SOLAR RUN A MINER?

Running solar? Find out exactly which miner your setup can handle 24/7 — and what you'd need to upgrade. Built for Aussie conditions with Gold Coast sun hours as default.

Count your total panels
Per panel — check your panel label
Total amp-hours (0 = no battery)
Check your battery or inverter spec
Gold Coast avg: 5hrs · Darwin: 6.5hrs · Melbourne: 3.5hrs
85% is typical for a good setup · lower if older panels
24hrs = full time · less if grid backup at night
